original_statement: what is the name of the last destination listed on this chart?
mutated_statement: what is the name of the last something listed on this content?
mutation_analysis: [Entity placeholder] + [Document-type generalization]: "destination" → "something" (specific place noun replaced by vague placeholder) | "chart" → "content" (specific document type generalized to a broad term)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据日志中的critique和judge_thought判断：critique明示“Step 1 attempts to use f_select_row(*), which selects all rows indiscriminately... Since the question asks for ‘the last something listed,’ the relevant action would be to identify and select the final row (row 16)”，而judge_thought多次以表述“最后一行是row 16... Prediction Answer is blank”讨论具体行内容。Agent随后直接选择并返回“16”作为答案，整个过程中没有出现“模糊”“不明确”“需要澄清”或请求更多信息的说明，也未对“destination→something, chart→content”这种概括化的歧义做出识别或询问。因此Agent是按自己理解直接处理问题，未表现出对目标模糊性的认知，符合“无法意识到指令模糊”类别。
